refnamediv.refpurpose: Draw bounding boxes into an image matrix.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imdrawboxes(image, boxes) out = imdrawboxes(image, boxes, rgb)

listitem.para: N-by-4 or 4-by-N bounding boxes in [x y width height] format, using image coordinates.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imdrawboxes draws detection or ROI boxes directly into an image matrix. It is useful when a script needs an annotated image instead of drawing into the current graphics axes.

refsection.title: Examples
